title: antennaria pulcherrima var. anaphaloides
intro: Antennaria pulcherrima var. anaphaloides, commonly known as mountain everlasting, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to western North America. The medicinal properties of Antennaria pulcherrima var. anaphaloides are attributed to its high saponin content, which is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Antennaria pulcherrima var. anaphaloides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, with the latter often used topically to soothe and calm irritated skin.
